title: Kofi and the Magic Seed
synopsis: When young Kofi plants a mysterious seed given by a wise rabbit, he discovers it grows into a magical beanstalk that leads to an adventure with friendly forest animals who need his help to save their village from eternal winter.

pages.text: Kofi loved his garden. He grew big red tomatoes and yellow flowers. Every morning, he watered his plants with a blue watering can. "Good morning, plants!" he said. "Time to grow!"

illustration.description: A young Black boy with curly hair and bright brown eyes waters plants in a colorful garden. He wears a green t-shirt and brown shorts. Sunlight streams through, creating a warm golden glow. Red tomatoes and yellow flowers bloom around him.
illustration.alt: Kofi watering his garden with colorful flowers and vegetables

pages.text: One day, a white rabbit hopped into his garden. The rabbit wore tiny glasses and carried a small purple bag. "Hello, Kofi," said the rabbit. "I have something special for you." Kofi's eyes grew wide. "A talking rabbit!" he said.

illustration.description: A fluffy white rabbit with round glasses and big expressive eyes stands next to Kofi in the garden. The rabbit holds a small purple velvet bag. Kofi looks amazed with his mouth open in surprise. Green leaves and colorful flowers frame the scene.
illustration.alt: A white rabbit with glasses talking to surprised Kofi in the garden

pages.text: The rabbit opened her purple bag. Inside was one tiny seed that sparkled like a star. "This is a magic seed," she said. "Plant it tonight when the moon is full. Something wonderful will happen!" She gave the seed to Kofi and hopped away.

illustration.description: The white rabbit extends her paw holding a glittering silver seed that catches moonlight. Kofi reaches out to take it with wonder in his big brown eyes. The full moon shines bright in the purple-blue night sky behind them, casting magical silvery light.
illustration.alt: The rabbit giving Kofi a sparkling magic seed under the full moon

pages.text: That night, Kofi planted the magic seed. He dug a small hole and put the seed inside. "Please grow into something wonderful," he whispered. Then he went to bed. All night long, he dreamed of magical plants.

illustration.description: Kofi kneels in his garden under the starry night sky, gently placing the glowing seed in dark soil. His face shows hope and excitement. Stars twinkle above and fireflies dance around him. The scene has a dreamy, magical purple and blue color palette.
illustration.alt: Kofi planting the magic seed under a starry night sky

pages.text: When Kofi woke up, he ran outside. "WOW!" he shouted. A giant beanstalk grew up, up, up into the clouds! It had thick green vines and big leaves. "This is amazing!" said Kofi. He started to climb the beanstalk. Up and up he went!

illustration.description: A massive green beanstalk with enormous leaves stretches impossibly high into fluffy white clouds. Kofi, tiny in comparison, climbs eagerly with a big smile. The morning sun creates golden rays through the leaves. His house looks small far below.
illustration.alt: Kofi climbing the giant beanstalk that reaches into the clouds

pages.text: At the top of the beanstalk, Kofi found a magical land. But everything was covered in snow and ice! A brown bear with a red scarf came running. "Please help us!" said the bear. "The Winter Witch made it cold forever. Our flowers are gone!"

illustration.description: A snowy magical landscape with ice-covered trees and frozen flowers. A friendly brown bear wearing a bright red scarf runs toward Kofi with worried but hopeful eyes. Snowflakes fall gently and everything sparkles with frost. The scene feels both beautiful and sad.
illustration.alt: A brown bear in a red scarf asking Kofi for help in the frozen magical land

pages.text: More animals came to meet Kofi. There was Maya, a fox with orange fur, and Jin, a raccoon with a striped tail. "The Winter Witch lives in that ice castle," said Maya. "She has a magic mirror that controls the weather," added Jin. "Can you help us get it back?"

illustration.description: Three diverse animal friends gather around Kofi in the snowy forest. Maya the orange fox has bright amber eyes, Jin the raccoon has distinctive black mask markings, and the brown bear towers protectively behind them. A glittering ice castle looms in the background.
illustration.alt: Kofi meeting Maya the fox, Jin the raccoon, and the bear in the snowy forest

pages.text: Kofi felt brave. "Let's go!" he said. They walked to the ice castle together. Inside, they found the Winter Witch sleeping by her magic mirror. The mirror showed springtime and flowers. "We need to wake her up nicely," whispered Kofi. "Maybe she's just lonely."

illustration.description: Inside a sparkling ice castle, a sad-looking Winter Witch with long white hair sleeps in an ornate ice chair. A magical mirror beside her shows vibrant spring scenes. Kofi and the animals peek around an ice pillar with gentle, understanding expressions on their faces.
illustration.alt: The sleeping Winter Witch in her ice castle with the magic mirror showing spring

pages.text: "Hello," said Kofi softly. The Winter Witch woke up. She had kind blue eyes but looked very sad. "I made everything cold because I was lonely," she said. "I forgot how to make friends." Kofi smiled. "We can be your friends! Will you bring back spring?" The witch smiled too. She touched the mirror, and suddenly flowers bloomed everywhere! "Thank you for being kind to me," she said. Kofi climbed down the beanstalk, happy to have made new friends.

illustration.description: The Winter Witch, now smiling warmly, touches her mirror as colorful flowers magically bloom throughout the ice castle. Kofi and all the animal friends cheer with joy. Spring sunshine streams through ice windows that begin to melt, creating rainbow prisms. Everyone looks happy and friendly.
illustration.alt: The Winter Witch bringing back spring as flowers bloom and everyone celebrates

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What did the white rabbit give to Kofi?
questions.explanation: The white rabbit gave Kofi a magic seed that sparkled like a star.

questions.question: What grew from the magic seed?
questions.explanation: The magic seed grew into a giant beanstalk that reached up into the clouds.

questions.question: Why did the Winter Witch make everything cold?
questions.explanation: The Winter Witch made everything cold because she was lonely and forgot how to make friends.

questions.question: Which animals helped Kofi in the magical land?
questions.explanation: Maya the fox, Jin the raccoon, and a brown bear helped Kofi in the magical land.

questions.question: How did Kofi solve the problem?
choices: By being kind and offering friendship
questions.explanation: Kofi solved the problem by being kind to the Winter Witch and offering to be her friend.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.text: Kofi planted the magic _____ in his garden. When he woke up, a giant _____ had grown up into the clouds. At the top, he met a _____ bear who needed help with the Winter Witch.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words
pages.text: The Winter Witch was _____ and had made everything cold. Kofi was _____ to her and offered to be her friend. She brought back _____ and flowers bloomed everywhere!
